}

{{ options.rightAlign?.transformDate ? rightAlignDate : options.rightAlign?.rightAlignText }} @if (options.rightAlign?.tooltip) { @if ( !options.rightAlign?.tooltip?.condition || (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: options.rightAlign?.tooltip?.condition : options.row) ) { } }
} @if (options.subRightAlign?.subRightAlignText || options.subRightAlign?.customTemplate) {
{{ options.subRightAlign?.transformDate ? subRightAlignDate : options.subRightAlign?.subRightAlignText }} @if (options.subRightAlign?.tooltip) { @if ( !options.subRightAlign?.tooltip?.condition || (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: options.subRightAlign?.tooltip?.condition : options.row) ) { } }
} @if (options.additionalInfo && (!options.additionalInfoMobPosition || options.additionalInfoMobPosition === 'inside-section')) { }

@for (item of options?.labelValue; track $index) {
@if (item.row[item.key] || item.showEmptyLabelValue) {
{{ item.label }}
{{ item.transformDate ? item.date : (item.row[item.key] || item.row[item.key] === 0) && !(item.hideZero && item.row[item.key] === 0) ? item.row[item.key] : '' }} @if (item.tooltip) { @if ( !item.tooltip.condition || (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: item.tooltip.condition : options.row) ) { } }
}
}
} @if (options?.rowTable?.length) {
@for (item of options?.rowTable; track $index) {

{{ item.transformDate ? item.date : (item.row[item.key] || item.row[item.key] === 0) && !(item.hideZero && item.row[item.key] === 0) ? item.row[item.key] : '' }} @if (item.tooltip) { @if ( !item.tooltip.condition || (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: item.tooltip.condition : options.row) ) { } }
}
} @if (options.rowClick && !options.rowClick.allRowClickable) { @if (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: options.rowClick?.condition : options.row) {

} @if (options.editableRow?.length) {

}

{{ addInfo.displayText.constructor.name === 'Function' ? (updatePipeEvent$ | async | callTemplateExpression: addInfo.displayText : options.row) : addInfo.displayText }}
}
